title: High-risk management action resumes against wrong target after context switch
current_question: After a management context switch, a high-risk action is resumed against an unintended target object and the audit trail needs verification.
critical_paths: Verify target object alignment and audit trail
acceptance_criteria: Protected action does not resume against an unintended target object.
Audit trail captures actor, object, and time consistently for the verified path.

secondary_findings.title: Audit trail field mismatch on resume path
